issues: The headline is AI-fabricated — no headline is visible in the OCR text. The actual headline cannot be confirmed from the OCR provided.
Rick Loughran is a photographer credit ('Staff photo by Rick Loughran'), not the article byline/author. No byline is present in the OCR text.

The long description states 'March 22, 1988' as the date of the game — the OCR says 'last night' relative to the publication date of March 23, 1988, which is consistent with March 22, but this is an inference; the OCR itself does not explicitly state the game date.

The long description's final sentence ('The Lakers displayed swift skating and passing prowess in their dominant performance') is a paraphrase of OCR detail but is acceptable; however the description should not attribute a byline to Rick Loughran when he is only the staff photographer.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: The Richmond Sockeyes were defeated 6-2 by the Vernon Lakers at Richmond Arena, putting the defending BCJHL champions down 3-0 in the best-of-seven league final.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The defending B.C. Junior Hockey League champion Richmond Sockeyes were defeated 6-2 at Richmond Arena by the swift-skating Vernon Lakers on the night of March 22, 1988. Vernon, the Interior Division champion, leads the best-of-seven league final 3-0 and could eliminate the Coastal Division champions in Game 4 that same evening. The article includes a staff photo by Rick Loughran.
review.notes: Rick Loughran is credited as a staff photographer ('Staff photo by Rick Loughran'), not the article author — the draft incorrectly used him as the byline. No headline or writer byline is recoverable from the OCR fragment. Editor should check the full scan for a headline and byline.
